text.title: Brainstorming Ideation (Agentic Pipeline) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: frame
step.action: Capture problem + personas + named consumer. Decide branches (classic + reverse, or one).

step.name: diverge
step.action: Run divergence prompt per persona × branch. Target raw_count ≥ 30.
step.decision-gate: If raw_count < 30, add a persona or branch and rerun.

step.name: semantic-dedup
step.action: Embed each idea; merge pairs with cosine ≥ 0.85. Log merges.

step.name: cluster-score
step.action: Cluster k=3..7 (silhouette-best). Score top 5-15 on impact × effort.

step.name: validate-and-deliver
step.action: Run `validate-brainstorming-ideation.py`. Deliver to named consumer with cluster summaries.
